The '''Kendamari Casinos''' was a chain of high-class [[Casino/Legends|casinos]] located on worlds in the [[Lol sector/Legends|Lol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The Kendamari organization had its headquarters on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kendamar]]. Kendamari Casinos were part of the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]], though some of the larger establishments were owned by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]].<ref name="GG11" />

They bribed a courier named [[Fellan]] to turn over evidence of [[Narloch]]'s affiliation to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] so they could take over his [[Casino/Legends|casinos]] on [[Reaper's World/Legends|Reaper's World]].<ref name="Elusive adventure">{{WEGCite|story=Elusive (adventure)|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}}</ref>
